name: io.github.spshkar84/madb-memory
title: MADB — Agent Memory Database
description: Durable causal memory for AI agents — semantic recall, causal lineage, and reusable skills. Local, single-owner.

environmentVariables.description: Where MADB stores your causal memory — local, on your machine (default ~/.madb/data).
environmentVariables.name: MADB_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Tenant namespace key for separating memory streams (e.g. per project). Defaults to a built-in namespace.
environmentVariables.name: MADB_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'off' to disable anonymous, count-only usage telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: MADB_TELEMETRY
